rules.description: User forwarded a receipt to receipts@ramp.com more than 48 hours ago and it still shows as unmatched on their Ramp transaction.
User's charge was flagged by Ramp as out-of-policy and they want to dispute it.
User wants to onboard a new vendor above the auto-approved threshold.
User asks an expense-policy question not answered by the in-app Ramp policy or the Notion handbook.
rules.redirect: Slack #finance-help. Only escalate to SD if they get no response within a business day.
